calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petitioners Alex Slusky, Danna Slusky, 3730 Washington Trust, and Lawrence Sussman's petition to confirm contractual arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge; Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk
